'''kavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:salably|salably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:salably|salably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kavate|kavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kavatesher|kavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavatesherĂ«m|kavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kavatero|kavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kavateshĂ«|kavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavateshĂ«m|kavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikavatero|gokikavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikavateshĂ«|gokikavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavateshĂ«m|gokikavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokavankerom|gokavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokavankeshĂ«|gokavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavankeshĂ«m|gokavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokavankeya|gokavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kavaterom|kavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavatemu|kavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kavateya|kavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikavaterom|gokikavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavatemu|gokikavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikavateya|gokikavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kavavate|kavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kavavatesher|kavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavavatesherĂ«m|kavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kavavatero|kavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kavavateshĂ«|kavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavavateshĂ«m|kavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikavavatero|gokikavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikavavateshĂ«|gokikavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavavateshĂ«m|gokikavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokavavankerom|gokavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokavavankeshĂ«|gokavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavavankeshĂ«m|gokavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokavavankeya|gokavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kavavaterom|kavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavavatemu|kavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kavavateya|kavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikavavaterom|gokikavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavavatemu|gokikavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikavavateya|gokikavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠte|kĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠtesher|kĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠtero|kĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠtero|gokikĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠterom|kĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠtemu|kĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠteya|kĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠterom|gokikĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠvĂŠteya|gokikĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafvafte|kafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafvaftesher|kafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafvaftesherĂ«m|kafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafvaftero|kafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafvafteshĂ«|kafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafvafteshĂ«m|kafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafvaftero|gokikafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafvafteshĂ«|gokikafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafvafteshĂ«m|gokikafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafvafnkerom|gokafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafvafnkeshĂ«|gokafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafvafnkeshĂ«m|gokafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafvafnkeya|gokafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafvafterom|kafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafvaftemu|kafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafvafteya|kafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafvafterom|gokikafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafvaftemu|gokikafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafvafteya|gokikafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
